steps.title: Use the habitat clue
steps.content: The text says manul cats live mostly alone in out-of-the-way parts of Asia, with Mount Everest as an example. Their habitats are difficult to research because they are remote in relation to people.

steps.title: Reject impossible fits
steps.content: A contradicts the remote habitat clue by saying the habitats are full of humans. B illogically says habitats are attracted to humans. C illogically says habitats are responsible for human populations. The phrase needed means far from large human populations. The answer is D.
